opportunities.title: Namecoach/Euphonia — Founding Voice AI Engineer (part-time, path to CAIO)
opportunities.description: Namecoach/Euphonia | Founding Voice AI Engineer (part-time, path to CAIO) | SF or Remote | REMOTE | Contract / Part-time, ~$30-120/hr by seniority, potentially converting to FT Namecoach has spent 10 years building the largest verified pronunciation dataset of its kind: ~2M self-recorded name pronunciations, plus a large corpus of human-verified phonetic spellings. We're now building Euphonia ( https://euphonia.namecoach.ai/ ), a provider-neutral middleware layer that makes any TTS engine pronounce names, acronyms, and other out-of-vocabulary terms correctly.

opportunities.title: Environmental Lead
opportunities.description: About OpenAI   OpenAI is building the world’s most advanced AI infrastructure platform. Through the Industrial program, we are developing a global portfolio of next-generation data center campuses that integrate power, land, water, fiber, and community systems into resilient, long-term AI infrastructure.  The Site Development & Readiness organization ensures that every location we advance is technically buildable, commercially viable, environmentally sound, and supported by the communities in which we operate. Environmental and community performance are treated as first-order constraints,

opportunities.title: Executive Management
opportunities.description:
Our goal is to reach 150,000 schools and impact 78 million children by teaching our cutting-edge physical activity programs to Educators.
